case_title: MANUEL GOMEZ VS. HANA ZEN, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT HANA ZEN, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION FAIRVIEW ENTERPRISES (CA), LTD, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANA ZEN, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION FAIRVIEW ENTERPRISES (CA), LTD, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY $20,386.22 PRINCIPAL, $454.09 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,140.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
